cards.en: In the end we went out for dinner, but I'd rather have eaten at home.
cards.cz: Nakonec jsme šli na večeři ven, ale byl bych se radši najedl doma.

cards.en: I'd write to her if I could remember her address.
cards.cz: Napsal bych jí, kdybych si mohl vzpomenout na její adresu.

cards.en: You wouldn't be so tired if you hadn't watched the film last night.
cards.cz: Nebyl bys tak unavený, kdybys byl včera večer nesledoval ten film.

cards.en: If it weren't for him, perhaps she wouldn't be here today.
cards.cz: Nebýt jeho, možná by tady dnes nebyla.

cards.en: If it weren't for their stupidity the situation wouldn't be so serious.
cards.cz: Nebýt jejich pitomosti, situace by nebyla tak vážná.

cards.en: If it werenjt for you I don't know what I'd do.
cards.cz: Nebýt tebe, nevím, co bych udělal.

cards.en: I wouldn't do it if I were in your position/place.
cards.cz: Nedělal bych to, kdybych byl na tvém místě.

cards.en: I left my purse/wallet at home. Otherwise I'd have done the/some shopping.
cards.cz: Nechala jsem si doma peněženku. Jinak bych byla nakoupila.

cards.en: I wouldn't go (there) if I didn't like/enjoy it.
cards.cz: Nechodil bych tam, kdyby se mi to nelíbilo.

cards.en: You wouldn't be so hungry if you had had (some) breakfast this morning.
cards.cz: Neměl bys takový hlad, kdybys byl dnes ráno snídal.

cards.en: I didn't have her phone number. Otherwise I would have invited her.
cards.cz: Neměl jsem její telefonní číslo. Jinak bych ji byl pozval.

cards.en: They didn't have them in my size. Otherwise I'd have bought them.
cards.cz: Neměli je v mé velikosti. Jinak bych si je byla koupila.

cards.en: We didn't have your address. Otherwise we'd have sent you a postcard.
cards.cz: Neměli jsme tvou adresu. Jinak bychom ti byli poslali pohled.

cards.en: She wouldn't be able to study if her parents didn't help her financially.
cards.cz: Nemohla by studovat, kdyby jí rodiče finančně nepomáhali.

cards.en: I wouldn't need all these exercises if I already knew how to use/if I could already use (the) English conditional.
cards.cz: Nepotřeboval bych všechna tato cvičení, kdybych už uměl používat anglický podmiňovací způsob.

cards.en: I wouldn't know about it if you hadn't told me.
cards.cz: Nevěděl bych o tom, kdybys mi to byl neřekl ty.

cards.en: I didn't know about it. Otherwise I would have told you.
cards.cz: Nevěděl jsem o tom. Jinak bych vám to byl řekl.

cards.en: I didn't know about their visit. Otherwise I'd have baked a cake.
cards.cz: Nevěděla jsem o jejich návštěvě. Jinak bych byla upekla koláč.

cards.en: You wouldn't believe it if I told you.
cards.cz: Nevěřil bys tomu, kdybych ti to řekl.

cards.en: The bride would have looked better if she hadn't been wearing trainers.
cards.cz: Nevěsta by bývala vypadala lépe, kdyby byla neměla na sobě tenisky.

cards.en: I didn't see him. Otherwise I would have said something.
cards.cz: Neviděla jsem ho. Jinak bych byla něco řekla.

cards.en: I don't know what I'd do if I were you.
cards.cz: Nevím, co bych dělal, kdybych byl na tvém místě [byl tebou].

cards.en: Nobody would have listened to you.
cards.cz: Nikdo by vás byl neposlouchal.

cards.en: She'd never understand (it) even if you explained it a hundred times.
cards.cz: Nikdy by tomu neporozuměla, i kdybys to vysvětlil stokrát.

cards.en: I would never have guessed her age.
cards.cz: Nikdy bych byla neuhodla její věk.

cards.en: I'd leave/go today if I could.
cards.cz: Odjel bych dnes, kdybych mohl.

cards.en: Would you wait (for) a moment?
cards.cz: Počkal byste chvilku?

cards.en: Let's go to the theatre tonight/this evening. ~ I'd rather see a film.
cards.cz: Pojďme dnes večer do divadla. ~ Raději bych viděl film.

cards.en: Would you help me with it?
cards.cz: Pomohla byste mi s tím?

cards.en: I would invite them if I knew their telephone number.
cards.cz: Pozval bych je, kdybych znal jejich telefonní číslo.

cards.en: Why don't you want to go to university? ~ I'd rather find a job and earn (some) money.
cards.cz: Proč nechceš jít na univerzitu? ~ Raději bych si našel práci a vydělával peníze.

cards.en: I'd rather go somewhere else next time.
cards.cz: Příště bych raději šel někam jinam.

cards.en: I'd lend you the money if I hadn't already spent so much today.
cards.cz: Půjčil bych ti ty peníze, kdybych už byl dnes tolik neutratil.

cards.en: I'd lend you the book if I could find it.
cards.cz: Půjčila bych ti tu knihu, kdybych ji mohla najít.

cards.en: I'd rather be a doctor than a dentist.
cards.cz: Raději bych byl lékařem než zubařem.

cards.en: I'd rather go by bus than (by) train.
cards.cz: Raději bych jel autobusem než vlakem.

cards.en: I'd rather not tell her yet.
cards.cz: Raději bych jí to ještě neříkal.

cards.en: I'd rather have a house in the country than a flat in the city/town.
cards.cz: Raději bych měl dům na venkově než byt ve městě.

cards.en: I'd rather have a Favorit than a Jaguar.
cards.cz: Raději bych měl favorita než jaguára.

cards.en: I'd rather not spend so/that much money.
cards.cz: Raději bych neutratil tolik peněz.

cards.en: I'd rather not know anything about it.
cards.cz: Raději bych o tom nic nevěděl.

cards.en: I'd prefer to wait here.
cards.cz: Raději bych počkal tady.

cards.en: I'd rather have bought the larger dictionary, but I didn't have enough money.
cards.cz: Raději bych si byl koupil ten větší slovník, ale neměl jsem dost peněz.

cards.en: I'd rather take a tent than sleep in hotels.
cards.cz: Raději bych si vzal stan než spal v hotelech.

cards.en: I'd rather take a taxi, if you don't mind.
cards.cz: Raději bych si vzal taxi, jestli ti to nevadí.

cards.en: We'd rather have gone to Norway this year, but Italy was cheaper.
cards.cz: Raději bychom letos byli jeli do Norska, ale Itálie byla levnější.

cards.en: Would she understand it?
cards.cz: Rozuměla by tomu?

cards.en: I'd tell you the answer if I knew it, but I don't.
cards.cz: Řekl bych ti tu odpověď, kdybych ji znal, ale já ji neznám.

cards.en: Would you have gone if they had invited you?
cards.cz: Šel bys, kdyby tě byli pozvali?

cards.en: The cat wouldn't have eaten your lunch if you hadn't left it lying on the floor.
cards.cz: Ta kočka by ti byla nesnědla oběd, kdybys ho byl nenechal ležet na podlaze.

cards.en: The accident wouldn't have happened if the children hadn't been playing in the street.
cards.cz: Ta nehoda by se byla nestala, kdyby si byly ty děti nehrály na ulici.

cards.en: The soup would have been better if you hadn't used so much salt.
cards.cz: Ta polévka by bývala byla lepší, kdybys byl nepoužil tolik soli.

cards.en: That man would have helped us if you hadn't been so rude/impolite.
cards.cz: Ten pán by nám byl pomohl, kdybys býval nebyl tak neslušný.

cards.en: The dog wouldn't have got out/escaped/run off if you'd closed/shut the door.
cards.cz: Ten pes by byl neutekl, kdybys byl zavřel dveře.

cards.en: The party would have been better if there had been more food and drink.
cards.cz: Ten večírek by byl býval lepší, kdyby bylo bývalo více jídla a pití.

cards.en: The trip/excursion would have been more pleasant if it hadn't been raining.
cards.cz: Ten výlet by býval byl příjemnější, kdyby bylo nepršelo.

cards.en: I wouldn't have expected that.
cards.cz: To bych byl neočekával.

cards.en: I wouldn't eat that if I were you.
cards.cz: To bych nejedl, kdybych byl na tvém místě [byl tebou].

cards.en: The flowers wouldn't have died if you had put them in(to) water immediately/straight away.
cards.cz: Ty kytky by byly nezašly, kdybys je byl dal hned do vody.

cards.en: These photographs would be better if you had used a different type of film.
cards.cz: Tyto fotografie by byly lepší, kdybys byl použil jiný typ filmu.

cards.en: The teacher wouldn't have to explain everything three times if the students listened.
cards.cz: Učitel by nemusel všechno vysvětlovat třikrát, kdyby studenti poslouchali.

cards.en: The teacher would have explained it again if you'd asked him.
cards.cz: Učitel by to byl znovu vysvětlil, kdyby ses ho byl zeptal.

cards.en: The/A teacher's job/work would be more pleasant if his students studied.
cards.cz: Učitelova práce by byla příjemnější, kdyby se jeho studenti učili.

cards.en: I'd do it if I really had to.
cards.cz: Udělal bych to, kdybych opravdu musel.

cards.en: Would you mind if my husband came too?
cards.cz: Vadilo by vám, kdyby přišel také můj manžel?

cards.en: He wouldn't work at all if he didn't have to.
cards.cz: Vůbec by nepracoval, kdyby nemusel.

cards.en: You wouldn't have to go to work at all if you married a millionaire.
cards.cz: Vůbec bys nemusela chodit do práce, kdyby sis vzala milionáře.

cards.en: She would look much younger if she had a different hairstyle.
cards.cz: Vypadala by mnohem mladší, kdyby měla jiný účes.

cards.en: They asked me a lot of questions (that/which) I'd rather not have answered.
cards.cz: Zeptali se mne na mnoho otázek, na které bych byl raději neodpovídal.

cards.en: He'd be angry/cross if you suggested it.
cards.cz: Zlobil by se, kdybys to navrhl.

cards.en: Would you have been angry/cross?
cards.cz: Zlobil by ses?

cards.en: The cathedral was damaged by a bomb in the war.
cards.cz: A bomb damaged the cathedral in the war.

cards.en: He got/was bitten by a dog on the beach.
cards.cz: A dog bit him on the beach.

cards.en: And how is it spelt/written?
cards.cz: A jak se píše?

cards.en: I was woken by a terrible storm in the night.
cards.cz: A terrible storm woke me in the night.

cards.en: And too much paper is (being) thrown away.
cards.cz: A vyhazuje se příliš mnoho papíru.

cards.en: Margaret got/was stung by a wasp in the park.
cards.cz: A wasp stung Margaret in the park.

cards.en: Mandarin Chinese is spoken by about 750 million people.
cards.cz: About 750 million people speak Mandarin Chinese.

cards.en: But look, the most important information has been left out!
cards.cz: Ale podívej, ta nejdůležitější informace byla vynechána!

cards.en: They got/were killed in an avalanche.
cards.cz: An avalanche killed them.

cards.en: The film was followed by an interesting lecture.
cards.cz: An interesting lecture followed the film.

cards.en: Anna wants to have/get her ears pierced.
cards.cz: Anna si chce dát propíchnout uši.

cards.en: Are any discounts going to be given?
cards.cz: Are they going to give any discounts?

cards.en: When this anthology appears next month, all his works will have been published in Czech.
cards.cz: Až se příští měsíc objeví tato antologie, všechna jeho díla už budou vydána v češtině.

cards.en: The Browns are having/getting a swimming pool built in the/their garden.
cards.cz: Brownovi si nechávají na zahradě postavit bazén.

cards.en: You will be paid at the end of next month.
cards.cz: Bude vám zaplaceno na konci příštího měsíce.

cards.en: You'll feel safer if you have/get all the locks changed.
cards.cz: Budeš se cítit bezpečněji, když si dáš vyměnit všechny zámky.

cards.en: You'll have to have/get the contract checked by a lawyer.
cards.cz: Budeš si tu smlouvu muset nechat zkontrolovat právníkem.

cards.en: Only serious offers will be accepted.
cards.cz: Budou přijaty pouze vážné nabídky.

cards.en: But the bill has already been paid!
cards.cz: But we have already paid the bill!

cards.en: But we would have received the letter by now if it had been posted on Thursday.
cards.cz: But we would have received the letter by now if they had posted it on Thursday.

cards.en: I would have slept until ten if I hadn't been woken by the neighbour's dog.
cards.cz: Byl bych spal do deseti, kdybych býval nebyl probuzen sousedovým psem.

cards.en: You'd be sent to prison if you did that.
cards.cz: Byl bys poslán do vězení, kdybys tohle udělal.

cards.en: Have you ever been stopped by the police?
cards.cz: Byl jsi někdy zastaven policií?

cards.en: It was a risk. They could have been/got caught.
cards.cz: Byl to risk. Mohli být chyceni.

cards.en: We'd prefer to be taught by a foreigner.
cards.cz: Byli bychom radši, kdyby nás učil cizinec.

cards.en: A lot of books have been written about that.
cards.cz: Bylo o tom napsáno hodně knih.

cards.en: It was dangerous. They could have been/got killed.
cards.cz: Bylo to nebezpečné. Mohli být zabiti.

cards.en: Can this be washed in the machine?
cards.cz: Can you wash this in the machine?

cards.en: Dogs should be left outside this shop.
cards.cz: Customers should leave their dogs outside this shop.

cards.en: a warning written in red
cards.cz: červeně napsané varování

cards.en: The article still needs to be edited.
cards.cz: Článek ještě potřebuje být editován.

cards.en: She cannot be relied on/upon.
cards.cz: Člověk se na ni nemůže spolehnout. [She cannot...]

cards.en: Did he get punished?/Was he punished?
cards.cz: Did anyone punish him?

cards.en: Did anyone get thrown out?/Was anyone thrown out?
cards.cz: Did they throw anyone out?

cards.en: a child covered with a blanket by its/his/her mother
cards.cz: dítě přikryté dekou svou matkou

cards.en: The child didn't want to be photographed.
cards.cz: Dítě se nechtělo fotit.

cards.en: By the end of the year four new houses will have been built in our street.
cards.cz: Do konce roku se v naší ulici postaví čtyři nové domy.

cards.en: Is French taught at your school?
cards.cz: Do they teach French at your school?

cards.en: Do you think the work will be finished by Friday?
cards.cz: Do you think they will finish the work by Friday?

cards.en: Somehow the letter got/was sent to the wrong address.
cards.cz: Dopis se shodou okolností ocitl [byl nějak poslán] na špatné adrese.

cards.en: He hoped the flat hadn't already been sold/hadn't been sold already.
cards.cz: Doufal, že ten byt se už neprodal.

cards.en: a door locked with a key
cards.cz: dveře zamčené klíčem

cards.en: a door locked by someone
cards.cz: dveře zamčené někým

cards.en: The concert is going to be seen live by eighty million television viewers.
cards.cz: Eighty million television viewers are going to see the concert live.

cards.en: George decided that he had been cheated.
cards.cz: George dospěl k názoru [se rozhodl], že byl podveden.

cards.en: Has the dog been fed today?
cards.cz: Has anyone fed the dog today?

cards.en: Has the thief been caught yet?
cards.cz: Have they caught the thief yet?

cards.en: Has your telephone been connected yet?
cards.cz: Have they connected your telephone yet?

cards.en: His last novel was finished in 1945.
cards.cz: He finished his last novel in 1945.

cards.en: He said the cake was too good to have been baked by his wife.
cards.cz: He said the cake was too good for his wife to have baked it.

cards.en: He says the washing machine is going to be delivered next Monday.
cards.cz: He says they are going to deliver the washing machine next Monday.

cards.en: He was hoping to have been paid by Christmas.
cards.cz: He was hoping that they would have paid him by Christmas.

cards.en: He is not respected by his employees.
cards.cz: His employees do not respect him.

cards.en: Historians say that this drug might have been used in the Middle Ages.
cards.cz: Historici říkají, že se tato droga možná používala ve středověku.

cards.en: The main gate is/gates are locked at seven o'clock every/each evening.
cards.cz: Hlavní vrata se zamykají každý večer v sedm hodin.

cards.en: How is the problem going to be solved?
cards.cz: How are they going to solve the problem?

cards.en: How is spaghetti made?
cards.cz: How do they make spaghetti?

cards.en: How many people was this letter sent to? (How many people were sent this letter?)
cards.cz: How many people did they send this letter to?

cards.en: How much are their employees paid?
cards.cz: How much do they pay their employees?

cards.en: She wants to be understood.
cards.cz: Chce, aby ji lidé chápali.

cards.en: He'd like to be better paid.
cards.cz: Chtěl by být lépe placený.

cards.en: I think we are being followed (by someone).
cards.cz: I think someone is following us.

cards.en: I think I would have been chosen if I had looked smarter at the interview.
cards.cz: I think they would have chosen me if I had looked smarter at the interview.

cards.en: I think too much money is spent by this company on advertising.
cards.cz: I think this company spends too much money on advertising.

cards.en: I would have come to the reception if I'd been told about it.
cards.cz: I would have come to the reception if they'd told me about it.

cards.en: I would have explained everything if I had been given the chance.
cards.cz: I would have explained everything if they had given me the chance.

cards.en: In some countries thieves get/have their hands cut off.
cards.cz: In some countries they cut off thieves' hands.

cards.en: Tim got/had his bicycle badly damaged in the race.
cards.cz: In the race someone badly damaged Tim's bicycle.

cards.en: A lot of the town's inhabitants got/had their houses bombed in the war.
cards.cz: In the war they bombed a lot of the town's inhabitants' houses.

cards.en: In which countries is rice grown?
cards.cz: In which countries do they grow rice?

cards.en: The money appeared not to have been touched.
cards.cz: It appeared that the money had not been touched.

cards.en: The author's manuscript is assumed to have been lost or destroyed.
cards.cz: It is assumed that the author's manuscript was lost or destroyed.

cards.en: The Incas are believed by some historians to have known laser techniques.
cards.cz: It is believed by some historians that the Incas knew laser techniques.

cards.en: The company is estimated to have lost ten million crowns already this year (is estimated already to have lost ten million crowns this year).
cards.cz: It is estimated that the company has already lost ten million crowns this year.

cards.en: She is known to have been a quiet, modest woman.
cards.cz: It is known that she was a quiet, modest woman.

cards.en: The new drug is known to have helped several hundred patients already (is known already to have helped several hundred patients).
cards.cz: It is known that the new drug has already helped several hundred patients.

cards.en: Two men are reported to have been arrested.
cards.cz: It is reported that two men have been arrested.

cards.en: Prague is said to have been founded by Libuše.
cards.cz: It is said that Prague was founded by Libuše.

cards.en: The couple are said to have donated their lottery prize to a children's charity.
cards.cz: It is said that the couple have donated their lottery prize to a children's charity.

cards.en: Only four passengers are thought to have survived.
cards.cz: It is thought that only four passengers have survived.

cards.en: The accident is thought to have happened at about five o'clock.
cards.cz: It is thought that the accident happened at about five o'clock.

cards.en: She seemed not to have been too offended.
cards.cz: It seemed that she hadn't been too offended.

cards.en: The door seemed to have been locked from the inside.
cards.cz: It seemed that the door had been locked from the inside.

cards.en: It's a new coat. It's never been worn.
cards.cz: It's a new coat. No one has ever worn it.

cards.en: an apple cut with a kitchen knife
cards.cz: jablko rozkrojené kuchyňským nožem

cards.en: How is your new product selling?
cards.cz: Jak se prodává váš nový výrobek?

cards.en: How is Easter celebrated in your country?
cards.cz: Jak se ve vaší zemi slaví Velikonoce?

cards.en: How is this word pronounced?
cards.cz: Jak se vyslovuje toto slovo?

cards.en: She's lazy and likes being waited on.
cards.cz: Je líná a ráda se nechává obskakovat [obsluhovat].

cards.en: His last play must have been written before 1780.
cards.cz: Jeho poslední hra byla určitě [musela být] napsána před rokem 1780.

cards.en: Their telephone must have been disconnected.
cards.cz: Jejich telefon byl určitě [musel být] odpojen, [použijte disconnect]

cards.en: a deer killed by a car
cards.cz: jelen zabitý autem

cards.en: If someone is 'photogenic' it means they photograph well (he/she photographs well).
cards.cz: Je-li někdo "fotogenický", znamená to, že se dobře fotografuje.

cards.en: If the archaeologists' theory is correct, a very important historical phenomenon will have been discovered.
cards.cz: Jestli je teorie těch archeologů správná, bude objeven velmi důležitý historický fenomén.

cards.en: If you buy our product your money will not have been wasted.
cards.cz: Jestli si koupíte náš výrobek, vaše peníze nebudou promarněny.

cards.en: If he does it in fourteen seconds the world record will have been broken.
cards.cz: Jestli to udělá za čtrnáct vteřin, bude překonán světový rekord.

cards.en: If we make these changes, a lot of money will have been saved by the end of the year.
cards.cz: Jestli uděláme tyto změny, do konce roku se ušetří hodně peněz.

cards.en: We can't use the room yet. It's still being cleaned.
cards.cz: Ještě tu místnost nemůžeme použít. Ještě se tam uklízí.

cards.en: Jim's nose got/was broken in a fight.
cards.cz: Jimovi někdo ve rvačce rozbil nos. [Jimův nos...]

cards.en: John's driving licence got/was taken away.
cards.cz: Johnovi byl odebrán řidičský průkaz. [Johnův řidičský průkaz byl odebrán.]

cards.en: Too many trees are (being) cut down.
cards.cz: Kácí se příliš mnoho stromů, [použijte cut down]

cards.en: Everyone needs to be loved by someone.
cards.cz: Každý potřebuje být někým milován.

cards.en: Where was this photograph taken?
cards.cz: Kde byla udělána tato fotografie?

cards.en: Where can I have/get this picture framed?
cards.cz: Kde si mohu nechat zarámovat tento obrázek?

cards.en: Where do you usually have/get your films developed?
cards.cz: Kde si obvykle necháváš vyvolat filmy?

cards.en: When and where was he last seen?
cards.cz: Kdy a kde byl naposledy viděn?

cards.en: When I saw the date on the envelope I knew it couldn't have been sent express.
cards.cz: Když jsem uviděl datum na obálce, věděl jsem, že to nemohlo být posláno expres.

cards.en: When he returned to the table he saw that his soup had been taken away.
cards.cz: Když se vrátil ke stolu, viděl, že jeho polévka byla odnesena.

cards.en: a cake baked by my mother
cards.cz: koláč upečený mou maminkou

cards.en: How many people will be chosen?
cards.cz: Kolik lidí bude vybráno?

cards.en: What languages are spoken in Switzerland?
cards.cz: Kterými jazyky se mluví ve Švýcarsku?

cards.en: Who was the book originally translated by?
cards.cz: Kým byla ta kniha původně přeložena?

cards.en: I got my back badly burnt in Turkey last year.
cards.cz: Last year in Turkey I badly burnt my back.

cards.en: Prague will be visited by several million visitors again this year.
cards.cz: Letos bude Praha zase navštívena několika miliony návštěvníků.

cards.en: Tickets were sold to around/about 30,000 fans.
cards.cz: Lístky byly prodány asi třiceti tisícům fanoušků.

cards.en: Little Barbara gets/has her pocket money stopped whenever she is naughty.
cards.cz: Little Barbara's parents stop her pocket money whenever she is naughty.

cards.en: My back got badly burnt/burned in Turkey last year.
cards.cz: Loni jsem si v Turecku ošklivě spálil záda, [má záda byla...]

cards.en: It is thought that the group of climbers is now somewhere near the summit.
cards.cz: Má se za to [Myslí se], že ta skupina horolezců je nyní někde blízko vrcholu.

cards.en: It is believed that the original of this painting is in a private collection in Paris.
cards.cz: Má se za to [Věří se], že originál toho obrazu je v soukromé sbírce v Paříži.

cards.en: Your hair's terribly long. You should have/get it cut.
cards.cz: Máš strašně dlouhé vlasy. Měl by sis je nechat ostříhat.

cards.en: I had the feeling I was being talked about/spoken about.
cards.cz: Měl jsem pocit, že se o mně mluví.

cards.en: He was lucky. He could have been injured.
cards.cz: Měl štěstí. Mohl být raněn.

cards.en: We should have/get the piano tuned.
cards.cz: Měli bychom si nechat naladit klavír.

cards.en: We should have been warned.
cards.cz: Měli jsme být varováni.

cards.en: It should have been done sooner/earlier.
cards.cz: Mělo se to udělat dříve.

cards.en: Michael isn't here. He can't have been invited.
cards.cz: Michael tady není. Nemohl být pozván.

cards.en: Michael wasn't there. He couldn't have been invited.
cards.cz: Michael tam nebyl. Nemohl být pozván.

cards.en: a room painted by a young man
cards.cz: místnost vymalovaná mladým mužem

cards.en: A lot of English words derive from Old French.
cards.cz: Mnoho anglických slov je odvozeno ze starofrancouzštiny.

cards.en: A lot of (the) inhabitants' houses got/were bombed in the war.
cards.cz: Mnoho domů obyvatel bylo za války vybombardováno.

cards.en: Computers are now owned by most schools.
cards.cz: Most schools now own computers.

cards.en: a fly killed with a newspaper
cards.cz: moucha zabitá novinami

cards.en: She might not have been told.
cards.cz: Možná, že jí to nebylo řečeno. [She...]

cards.en: Perhaps a solution will have been found by the end of the century.
cards.cz: Možná, že se do konce století najde řešení.

cards.en: My camera got/was stolen in Greece.
cards.cz: Můj fot'ák byl v Řecku ukraden.

cards.en: We must hurry. It might already have been sold (might have been sold already).
cards.cz: Musíme si pospíšit. Možná, že se to už prodalo.

cards.en: You can return at five. The necessary repairs will have been made by then/by that time.
cards.cz: Můžeš se vrátit v pět. Důležité opravy budou udělány do té doby.

cards.en: I think you should have/get your tyres checked.
cards.cz: Myslím, že by sis měl nechat zkontrolovat pneumatiky.

cards.en: I think I'd have understood it better if it had been written in Chinese!
cards.cz: Myslím, že bych tomu byl lépe rozuměl, kdyby to bylo napsáno čínsky!

cards.en: I think I'll have to have/get the tooth pulled out/extracted.
cards.cz: Myslím, že si ten zub budu muset nechat vytrhnout.

cards.en: Do you think she'll be shocked by the news?
cards.cz: Myslíš, že bude tou zprávou šokována?

cards.en: Do you think we'll be invited?
cards.cz: Myslíš, že budeme pozváni?

cards.en: What was this tool used for?
cards.cz: Na co se používalo toto nářadí?

cards.en: What is it used for?
cards.cz: Na co se to používá?

cards.en: Eight men were chosen for the expedition.
cards.cz: Na expedici bylo vybráno osm mužů.

cards.en: At the end of this week I'll have been employed here (for) one year.
cards.cz: Na konci tohoto týdne již tady budu zaměstnaný rok.

cards.en: What channel will the documentary be shown on?
cards.cz: Na kterém programu se bude dávat ten dokumentární film?

cards.en: A meeting is being organized/arranged for next Tuesday.
cards.cz: Na příští úterý se svolává [organizuje] schůze.

cards.en: Our magazine is sent to two thousand readers every/each month.
cards.cz: Náš časopis je každý měsíc zasílán dvěma tisícům čtenářů.

cards.en: Our house was built in 1907.
cards.cz: Náš dům byl postaven v roce 1907.

cards.en: Luckily my passport was taken/delivered to the police station.
cards.cz: Naštěstí byl můj pas doručen na policejní stanici.

cards.en: Fortunately no one was injured in the accident.
cards.cz: Naštěstí při té nehodě nebyl nikdo zraněn.

cards.en: Don't worry. She'll be taken good care of here.
cards.cz: Neboj. Bude tu o ni dobře postaráno.

cards.en: They weren't invited.
cards.cz: Nebyli pozváni.

cards.en: He had his portrait painted on (the) Charles Bridge.
cards.cz: Nechal si na Karlově mostě namalovat svůj portrét.

cards.en: We had our photograph taken in front of Buckingham Palace.
cards.cz: Nechali jsme se vyfotografovat před Buckinghamským palácem.

cards.en: They had their garden designed by a professional.
cards.cz: Nechali si zahradu navrhnout profesionálem.

cards.en: We didn't want to be noticed.
cards.cz: Nechtěli jsme, aby si nás někdo všiml.

cards.en: They didn't want to be seen.
cards.cz: Nechtěli, aby je někdo viděl.

cards.en: I don't like being looked at when Pm eating.
cards.cz: Nemám rád, když se na mě někdo dívá, když jím.

cards.en: She shouldn't have been invited.
cards.cz: Neměla být pozvána.

cards.en: I can't go with you. I've been invited to a wedding.
cards.cz: Nemohu s tebou jít. Byl jsem pozván na svatbu.

cards.en: He can't stand being laughed at.
cards.cz: Nesnese, když se mu někdo směje.

cards.en: I wouldn't mind this job/work if it were better paid.
cards.cz: Nevadila by mi tato práce, kdyby byla lépe placena.

cards.en: She didn't know the lock had been changed.
cards.cz: Nevěděla, že ten zámek byl vyměněn.

cards.en: By the time we get there all the best things will have been sold.
cards.cz: Než se tam dostaneme, všechny nejlepší věci budou prodány.

cards.en: She will never be forgotten.
cards.cz: Nikdy nebude zapomenuta.

cards.en: The new conference centre will be opened on 1st March.
cards.cz: Nové konferenční centrum bude otevřeno 1. března.

cards.en: The new car park will be used mainly by shoppers and local businessmen.
cards.cz: Nové parkoviště bude využíváno hlavně nakupujícími a místními obchodníky.

cards.en: a picture painted with a brush
cards.cz: obraz namalovaný štětcem

cards.en: a picture drawn in blue ink
cards.cz: obrázek nakreslený modrým inkoustem

cards.en: a picture drawn by Picasso
cards.cz: obrázek nakreslený Picassem

cards.en: It is expected that the weather will be better tomorrow./It is expected that there will be better weather tomorrow.
cards.cz: Očekává se, že zítra bude lepší počasí.

cards.en: She expects/She is expecting to be chosen for the job.
cards.cz: Očekává, že ji na tu práci vyberou.

cards.en: A doctor was sent for immediately.
cards.cz: Okamžitě se poslalo pro doktora. [A doctor...]

cards.en: The exam was passed by only four students.
cards.cz: Only four students passed the exam.

cards.en: The original must have been destroyed.
cards.cz: Originál byl určitě [musel být] zničen.

cards.en: You will be taken from the airport to your hotel by our special bus service.
cards.cz: Our special bus service will take you from the airport to your hotel.

cards.en: The dog is waiting to be fed.
cards.cz: Pes čeká, až ho někdo nakrmí.

cards.en: The letter T in the word 'walk' is not pronounced.
cards.cz: Písmeno "1" ve slově "walk" se nevyslovuje.

cards.en: No tickets will be sold after six o'clock.
cards.cz: Po šesté hodině se nebudou prodávat žádné lístky.

cards.en: Look at the date on the envelope. The letter can't have been sent express.
cards.cz: Podívej se na datum na obálce. Ten dopis nemohl být poslán expres.

cards.en: It is reported that the President is feeling much better now.
cards.cz: Podle zpráv [použijte report] se nyní prezident cítí mnohem lépe.

cards.en: The fields were covered in/with snow.
cards.cz: Pole byla pokryta sněhem.

cards.en: The policeman told him that his car had been found.
cards.cz: Policista mu řekl, že jeho auto bylo nalezeno.

cards.en: He asked to be taken to the director.
cards.cz: Poprosil, aby ho někdo vzal k řediteli.

cards.en: They asked to be informed as soon as possible.
cards.cz: Poprosili, aby byli co nejdříve informováni.

cards.en: He needs to be advised.
cards.cz: Potřebuje, aby mu někdo poradil.

cards.en: She begged to be forgiven.
cards.cz: Požádala [naléhavě!], aby jí odpustili.

cards.en: Why didn't you apply for the job? I think you could/might have been chosen.
cards.cz: Proč jsi nepožádal o tu práci? Myslím, že jsi mohl být vybrán.

cards.en: The exact date of the fire is not known.
cards.cz: Přesné datum požáru není známo.

cards.en: All the windows were broken in the/a storm.
cards.cz: Při bouři se rozbila všechna okna.

cards.en: The radio is working again. I've had it repaired.
cards.cz: Rádio už zase funguje. Nechal jsem ho opravit.

cards.en: The director says that too much money is being spent on administration.
cards.cz: Ředitel říká, že se utrácí příliš mnoho peněz za administrativu.

cards.en: The director is going to have/get a new computer system installed next month.
cards.cz: Ředitel si příští měsíc nechá nainstalovat nový počítačový systém.

cards.en: He said the job had already been offered to someone else.
cards.cz: Řekl, že ta práce už byla nabídnuta někomu jinému.

cards.en: She said she had been followed by a young man with a dog.
cards.cz: Řekla, že byla sledována mladým mužem se psem.

cards.en: She claims to have been treated unfairly.
cards.cz: She claims that she has been treated unfairly.

cards.en: a word printed in italics
cards.cz: slovo vytištěné kurzívou

cards.en: Are dogs allowed on the buses here?
cards.cz: Smějí zde psi do autobusů?

cards.en: Jim got/had his nose broken at the demonstration.
cards.cz: Someone broke Jim's nose at the demonstration.

cards.en: My money has been stolen!
cards.cz: Someone has stolen my money!

cards.en: My mother-in-law got/was locked in the toilet!
cards.cz: Someone locked my mother-in-law in the toilet!

cards.en: Liz was sent an anonymous love letter.
cards.cz: Someone sent Liz an anonymous love letter.

cards.en: He got/was shot in the leg.
cards.cz: Someone shot him in the leg.

cards.en: I got/had my camera stolen in Greece.
cards.cz: Someone stole my camera in Greece.

cards.en: My passport was stolen on the bus.
cards.cz: Someone stole my passport on the bus.

cards.en: a roof covered in/with snow
cards.cz: střecha pokrytá sněhem

cards.en: The students asked to be tested again.
cards.cz: Studenti poprosili, aby je učitel znovu vyzkoušel.

cards.en: I'd study Russian if it were taught here.
cards.cz: Studoval bych ruštinu, kdyby se jí tu učilo.

cards.en: a school window broken by a football
cards.cz: školní okno rozbité fotbalovým míčem

cards.en: Have you ever been stung by a bee?
cards.cz: Štípla tě někdy včela? [použijte trpný rod]

cards.en: The building is dangerous. It'll have to be pulled down.
cards.cz: Ta budova je nebezpečná. Bude se muset zbourat, [použijte pull down]

cards.en: The book might already have been translated (might have been translated already).
cards.cz: Ta kniha už možná byla přeložena.

cards.en: The fridge was too big for our car, so we had to have/get it delivered.
cards.cz: Ta lednice byla do našeho auta moc velká, takže jsme si ji museli nechat dovézt.

cards.en: The sheets were dirty. They couldn't have been washed.
cards.cz: Ta prostěradla byla špinavá. Nemohla být vyprána.

cards.en: The contract should have been signed yesterday.
cards.cz: Ta smlouva se měla podepsat včera.

cards.en: Such behaviour will not be tolerated.
cards.cz: Takové chování se nebude tolerovat.

cards.en: This mistake should never have been made.
cards.cz: Tato chyba se nikdy neměla udělat.

cards.en: This information shouldn't have been published.
cards.cz: Tato informace neměla být zveřejněna.

cards.en: This information is being sent to all our members.
cards.cz: Tato informace se posílá všem našim členům, [teď]

cards.en: This book is printed on recycled paper.
cards.cz: Tato kniha je vytištěna na recyklovaném papíře.

cards.en: This material/fabric doesn't wash well.
cards.cz: Tato látka se nepere dobře.

cards.en: These sheets are dirty. They can't have been washed.
cards.cz: Tato prostěradla jsou špinavá. Nemohla být vyprána.

cards.en: This university was founded in 1348.
cards.cz: Tato univerzita byla založena v roce 1348.

cards.en: The telephone has been cut off again!
cards.cz: Telefon byl už zase odpojen! [použijte cut off]

cards.en: The magazine would be read by more people if it had more articles and fewer advertisements.
cards.cz: Ten časopis by byl čten více lidmi, kdyby měl více článků a méně reklam.

cards.en: The letter was posted in Berlin/was sent from Berlin.
cards.cz: Ten dopis byl poslán z Berlína.

cards.en: The house would have been sold for more money if it had had a garage.
cards.cz: Ten dům by býval byl prodán za více peněz, kdyby byl měl garáž.

cards.en: The gas should have been turned off.
cards.cz: Ten plyn měl být vypnut.

cards.en: The text was full of basic mistakes. It couldn't have been written by a native speaker.
cards.cz: Ten text byl plný základních chyb. Nemohl být napsán rodilým mluvčím.

cards.en: The trip was interesting, but it could have been better organized.
cards.cz: Ten výlet byl zajímavý, ale mohl být lépe zorganizovaný.

cards.en: This film has not yet been shown (hasn't been shown yet) on Czech Television.
cards.cz: Tento film se v České televizi ještě nedával.

cards.en: This carpet doesn't clean very easily.
cards.cz: Tento koberec se nečistí moc snadno.

cards.en: His first collection of poems is being published this month.
cards.cz: Tento měsíc se vydává jeho první sbírka básní.

cards.en: You should have/get this painting/picture insured.
cards.cz: Tento obraz by sis měl nechat pojistit.

cards.en: This translation reads well.
cards.cz: Tento překlad se dobře čte.

cards.en: This novel has been translated into several world languages.
cards.cz: Tento román byl přeložen do několika světových jazyků.

cards.en: This cheese should have been eaten by last Thursday!
cards.cz: Tento sýr se měl sníst do minulého čtvrtka!

cards.en: This text is full of basic mistakes. It can't have been written by a native speaker.
cards.cz: Tento text je plný základních chyb. Nemohl být napsán rodilým mluvčím.

cards.en: I can't use my car this week. It's being repaired.
cards.cz: Tento týden nemohu používat své auto. Opravuje se.

cards.en: We're having/getting our kitchen repainted this week.
cards.cz: Tento týden si necháme znovu vymalovat kuchyň.

cards.en: a text translated with a dictionary
cards.cz: text přeložený se slovníkem

cards.en: a text translated by a student
cards.cz: text přeložený studentem

cards.en: Everything will be paid (for) by the company.
cards.cz: The company will pay for everything.

cards.en: More money would be saved if the company moved to a smaller office.
cards.cz: The company would save more money if it moved to a smaller office.

cards.en: The house is now being closely watched by the police.
cards.cz: The police are now closely watching the house.

cards.en: Albert got/had all his papers confiscated by the police.
cards.cz: The police confiscated all Albert's papers.

cards.en: The house was searched by the police but nothing was found.
cards.cz: The police searched the house but didn't find anything, [dvě pasiva]

cards.en: He was stopped by the police on the way home.
cards.cz: The police stopped him on the way home.

cards.en: Our long and difficult journey wasn't helped by the terrible weather.
cards.cz: The terrible weather didn't help our long and difficult journey.

cards.en: Three men are going to be employed for the job.
cards.cz: They are going to employ three men for the job.

cards.en: Some of her paintings are going to be exhibited at the city gallery next month.
cards.cz: They are going to exhibit some of her paintings at the city gallery next month.

cards.en: The meeting is going to be held in the director's office.
cards.cz: They are going to hold the meeting in the director's office.

cards.en: An old woman got/was arrested by mistake.
cards.cz: They arrested an old woman by mistake.

cards.en: He was asked a lot of difficult questions at the interview.
cards.cz: They asked him a lot of difficult questions at the interview.

cards.en: He was awarded the first prize.
cards.cz: They awarded him the first prize.

cards.en: He wasn't given a second chance.
cards.cz: They didn't give him a second chance.

cards.en: We weren't taught Latin at school.
cards.cz: They didn't teach us Latin at school.

cards.en: I wasn't told about it.
cards.cz: They didn't tell me about it.

cards.en: Films are not shown on Sundays.
cards.cz: They do not show films on Sundays.

cards.en: I got/was fined two hundred crowns.
cards.cz: They fined me two hundred crowns.

cards.en: Little Tim was given a laptop computer for Christmas.
cards.cz: They gave little Tim a laptop computer for Christmas.

cards.en: He has already been warned several times.
cards.cz: They have already warned him several times.

cards.en: The job hasn't been offered to anyone yet./No one has been offered the job yet.
cards.cz: They have not offered the job to anyone yet.

cards.en: He has often been criticized for that.
cards.cz: They have often criticized him for that.

cards.en: You might be caught!
cards.cz: They might catch you!

cards.en: It might be explained in the next chapter.
cards.cz: They might explain it in the next chapter.

cards.en: She might never be found.
cards.cz: They might never find her.

cards.en: They might not be fined.
cards.cz: They might not fine them.

cards.en: The job might not be offered to any of us.
cards.cz: They might not offer the job to any of us.

cards.en: Application forms must be returned by 31st March.
cards.cz: They must return application forms by 31st March.

cards.en: Czech beer is now sold in a lot of British supermarkets.
cards.cz: They now sell Czech beer in a lot of British supermarkets.

cards.en: Courses are offered in various foreign languages.
cards.cz: They offer courses in various foreign languages.

cards.en: Jane was offered the job.
cards.cz: They offered the job to Jane.

cards.en: He was paid on Friday.
cards.cz: They paid him on Friday.

cards.en: Stamps are sold at the post office.
cards.cz: They sell stamps at the post office.

cards.en: She got/was sent to the wrong department.
cards.cz: They sent her to the wrong department.

cards.en: Fifty people were sent the questionnaire.
cards.cz: They sent the questionnaire to fifty people.

cards.en: They both (Both of them) got/were sent to prison for five years.
cards.cz: They sent them both to prison for five years.

cards.en: Breakfast is served between 7am and 9am.
cards.cz: They serve breakfast between 7am and 9am.

cards.en: Something should be done about it.
cards.cz: They should do something about it.

cards.en: Cinderella is shown on television every Christmas.
cards.cz: They show Cinderella on television every Christmas.

cards.en: The house was sold to a Japanese banker.
cards.cz: They sold the house to a Japanese banker.

cards.en: John got/had his driving licence taken away.
cards.cz: They took John's driving licence away.

cards.en: All successful applicants will be informed by 15th September.
cards.cz: They will inform all successful applicants by 15th September.

cards.en: You would be severely punished if you were caught.
cards.cz: They would severely punish you if they caught you. [dvě pasiva]

cards.en: We wouldn't have been noticed if you hadn't been wearing that stupid hat.
cards.cz: They wouldn't have noticed us if you hadn't been wearing that stupid hat.

cards.en: A new petrol station is being built on the corner.
cards.cz: They're building a new petrol station on the corner.

cards.en: The local cinema is being converted into a nightclub.
cards.cz: They're converting the local cinema into a nightclub.

cards.en: Not enough is being done for the homeless.
cards.cz: They're not doing enough for the homeless.

cards.en: She is being operated on this afternoon.
cards.cz: They're operating on her this afternoon.

cards.en: The pavement in front of our house is being repaired this week.
cards.cz: They're repairing the pavement in front of our house this week.

cards.en: That film is being shown at four Prague cinemas this week.
cards.cz: They're showing that film at four Prague cinemas this week.

cards.en: The contract is being signed this morning in Geneva.
cards.cz: They're signing the contract this morning in Geneva.

cards.en: Women have never been employed by this company.
cards.cz: This company has never employed women.

cards.en: Too little money is being spent by this government on education.
cards.cz: This government is spending too little money on education.

cards.en: This joke wouldn't be funny if it were translated into Czech.
cards.cz: This joke wouldn't be funny if you translated it into Czech.

cards.en: The lives of millions of people are going to be improved by this new invention.
cards.cz: This new invention is going to improve the lives of millions of people.

cards.en: This photograph isn't good enough to have been taken by a professional.
cards.cz: This photograph isn't good enough for a professional to have taken it.

cards.en: Silent Night is sung in many languages.
cards.cz: Tichá noc se zpívá v mnoha jazycích.

cards.en: Tim's bicycle got/was badly damaged in the race.
cards.cz: Timovo kolo bylo při závodech hodně poškozeno.

cards.en: Your article will be read by thousands of people.
cards.cz: Tisíce lidí budou číst váš článek, [použijte trpný rod]

cards.en: The car drives beautifully.
cards.cz: To auto se krásně řídí.

cards.en: What a beautiful photograph! You should have/get it enlarged.
cards.cz: To je ale krásná fotka! Měl by sis ji nechat zvětšit.

cards.en: The meat couldn't have been cooked (for) very long. It was still bleeding!
cards.cz: To maso se nemohlo vařit moc dlouho. Ještě bylo krvavé!

cards.en: He won't be forgiven for that.
cards.cz: To mu nebude odpuštěno.

cards.en: The window must have been left open.
cards.cz: To okno bylo určitě [muselo být] necháno otevřené.

cards.en: That is often said.
cards.cz: To se často říká.

cards.en: This would have been finished/done a long time ago if you had helped me.
cards.cz: Toto by bývalo bylo dávno dokončeno, kdybys mi byl pomohl.

cards.en: This meat can't have been cooked (for) very long. It's still bleeding!
cards.cz: Toto maso se nemohlo vařit moc dlouho. Ještě je krvavé!

cards.en: Thirty-five divided by five is seven.
cards.cz: Třicet pět děleno pěti je sedm.

cards.en: Your purse/wallet wouldn't have been stolen if you hadn't put it in your back pocket.
cards.cz: Tvá peněženka by bývala nebyla ukradena, kdyby sis ji byla nedala do zadní kapsy.

cards.en: The money was found in Jeff's room.
cards.cz: Ty peníze se našly v Jeffově pokoji.

cards.en: These holes must have been made by moths.
cards.cz: Tyto díry byly určitě [musely být] udělány moly.

cards.en: These fresco(e)s might have been painted by Michelangelo.
cards.cz: Tyto fresky byly možná namalovány Michelangelem.

cards.en: These folk songs were collected in villages in the east of Moravia.
cards.cz: Tyto lidové písně byly sebrány na vesnicích na východě Moravy.

cards.en: This newspaper is published in Manchester.
cards.cz: Tyto noviny se vydávají v Manchesteru.

cards.en: This money will not be taxed.
cards.cz: Tyto peníze nebudou zdaněny.

cards.en: These candles don't light easily.
cards.cz: Tyto svíčky se nezapalují snadno.

cards.en: This dress does up at the back.
cards.cz: Tyto šaty se zapínají vzadu.

cards.en: These changes shouldn't have been made.
cards.cz: Tyto změny se neměly dělat.

cards.en: Did she make her wedding dress herself, or did she have/get it made?
cards.cz: Ušila si své svatební šaty sama, nebo si je nechala ušít?

cards.en: I'm (already) being served, thank you.
cards.cz: Už dostávám [jsem obsluhován], děkuji.

cards.en: Have these books (already) been paid for?
cards.cz: Už se za tyto knihy zaplatilo?

cards.en: In Britain Christmas presents are given on 25th December.
cards.cz: V Británii se vánoční dárky dávají 25. prosince.

cards.en: A new pyramid has just been discovered in Egypt.
cards.cz: V Egyptě byla právě objevena nová pyramida.

cards.en: A new computer system is being installed in the library today.
cards.cz: V knihovně se dnes instaluje nový počítačový systém.

cards.en: What language is this text written in?
cards.cz: V kterém jazyce je napsán tento text?

cards.en: In some countries thieves' hands get/are cut off.
cards.cz: V některých zemích zlodějům uříznou ruce, [ruce zlodějů jsou...]

cards.en: A lot of/Great progress is being made in this field/area of linguistics.
cards.cz: V tomto oboru lingvistiky se dosahuje velkého pokroku.

cards.en: a Christmas tree decorated by children
cards.cz: vánoční stromek ozdobený dětmi

cards.en: a Christmas tree decorated with candles and sweets
cards.cz: vánoční stromek ozdobený svíčkami a bonbony

cards.en: Your car shouldn't have been parked there.
cards.cz: Vaše auto tam nemělo být zaparkováno.

cards.en: Which newspaper(s) will the results be published in?
cards.cz: Ve kterých novinách budou zveřejněny ty výsledky?

cards.en: It is known that he is hiding somewhere in the Caribbean.
cards.cz: Ví se, že se skrývá někde v Karibské oblasti, [on]

cards.en: Wine is produced mainly in the south of this country.
cards.cz: Víno se vyrábí hlavně na jihu této země.

cards.en: Do you know that tomorrow's meeting has been cancelled?
cards.cz: Víš, že zítřejší schůze byla zrušena?

cards.en: All Albert's papers got/were confiscated by the police.
cards.cz: Všechny Albertovy papíry byly zabaveny policií.

cards.en: All his songs sing well.
cards.cz: Všechny jeho písničky se dobře zpívají.

cards.en: All our financial problems would be solved if we won (in) the lottery.
cards.cz: Všechny naše finanční problémy by se vyřešily, kdybychom vyhráli v loterii.

cards.en: New housing estates are being built everywhere.
cards.cz: Všude se stavějí nová sídliště.

cards.en: Five hundred crowns will be sent to the winner. (The winner will be sent five hundred crowns.)
cards.cz: Výherci bude posláno pět set korun.

cards.en: a shop window broken with a brick
cards.cz: výloha rozbitá cihlou

cards.en: He explained that the text had been written very quickly.
cards.cz: Vysvětlil, že ten text byl napsán velice rychle.

cards.en: That can be explained quite easily. (That can be quite easily explained.)
cards.cz: We can explain that quite easily.

cards.en: Mistakes cannot be corrected later.
cards.cz: We cannot correct mistakes later.

cards.en: All our guests' rooms are cleaned three times a week.
cards.cz: We clean all our guests' rooms three times a week.

cards.en: All lessons are given in English here.
cards.cz: We give all lessons in English here.

cards.en: A solution needs to have been found by 1st May.
cards.cz: We need to have found a solution by 1st May.

cards.en: We were pleased to have been invited.
cards.cz: We were pleased they had invited us.

cards.en: You would be understood if you spoke more clearly.
cards.cz: We would understand you if you spoke more clearly.

cards.en: What can be done?
cards.cz: What can we do?

cards.en: What is it caused by?
cards.cz: What causes it?

cards.en: When is the news going to be announced?
cards.cz: When are they going to announce the news?

cards.en: When he's caught he will be punished.
cards.cz: When they catch him they will punish him. [dvě pasiva]

cards.en: Where are kilts worn?
cards.cz: Where do they wear kilts?

cards.en: Which country will he be sent to next?
cards.cz: Which country will they send him to next?

cards.en: Which hospital was he taken to?
cards.cz: Which hospital did they take him to?

cards.en: Who were his early works influenced by?
cards.cz: Who influenced his early works?

cards.en: Who was the light-bulb invented by?
cards.cz: Who invented the light-bulb?

cards.en: Who is the Prague Spring festival organized by?
cards.cz: Who organizes the Prague Spring festival?

cards.en: Who are her books published by?
cards.cz: Who publishes her books?

cards.en: Who was the match won by?
cards.cz: Who won the match?

cards.en: Would you go if you were invited?
cards.cz: Would you go if they invited you?

cards.en: You are lucky not to have been thrown out.
cards.cz: You are lucky they didn't throw you out.

cards.en: Tickets can be bought at the main entrance.
cards.cz: You can buy tickets at the main entrance.

cards.en: These goods can be returned only if you have the receipt.
cards.cz: You can return these goods only if you have the receipt.

cards.en: Happiness can't be bought.
cards.cz: You can't buy happiness.

cards.en: It can't be described.
cards.cz: You can't describe it.

cards.en: It cannot be done straight away.
cards.cz: You cannot do it straight away.

cards.en: This expression cannot be translated.
cards.cz: You cannot translate this expression.

cards.en: This information does not have to be given on your application form.
cards.cz: You don't have to give this information on your application form.

cards.en: The decision does not have to be made immediately.
cards.cz: You don't have to make the decision immediately.

cards.en: This product does not have to be pre-cooked.
cards.cz: You don't have to pre-cook this product.

cards.en: Papers do not have to be shown.
cards.cz: You don't have to show papers.

cards.en: The text does not have to be translated.
cards.cz: You don't have to translate the text.

cards.en: This homework must be done by Wednesday.
cards.cz: You must do this homework by Wednesday.

cards.en: All bags and coats must be left with the librarian.
cards.cz: You must leave all bags and coats with the librarian.

cards.en: Keys must be left at reception.
cards.cz: You must leave keys at reception.

cards.en: The deposit must be paid by 1st October.
cards.cz: You must pay the deposit by 1st October.

cards.en: The oil should be changed every ten thousand kilometres.
cards.cz: You should change the oil every ten thousand kilometres.

cards.en: Food and drinks should not be taken into the cinema.
cards.cz: You should not take food and drinks into the cinema.

cards.en: This medicine should be taken three times a day.
cards.cz: You should take this medicine three times a day.

cards.en: What is chocolate made from?
cards.cz: Z čeho se dělá čokoláda?

cards.en: Two drawings by Monet have been stolen from the local museum.
cards.cz: Z místního muzea byly ukradeny dvě kresby od Moneta.

cards.en: A prize will be given/awarded for the best story.
cards.cz: Za nejlepší příběh bude udělena cena.

cards.en: Deposits will not be returned.
cards.cz: Zálohy nebudou vráceny.

cards.en: The match has been postponed until tomorrow.
cards.cz: Zápas byl odložen na zítřek.

cards.en: I forgot that the day of the meeting had been changed to Friday.
cards.cz: Zapomněl jsem, že den schůzky byl změněn na pátek.

cards.en: I asked if/whether the room had already been cleaned.
cards.cz: Zeptal jsem se, jestli ten pokoj už byl uklizen.

cards.en: He is going to be operated on tomorrow morning.
cards.cz: Zítra ráno bude operován. [He...]

cards.en: Everything will be explained to you tomorrow.
cards.cz: Zítra vám vše bude vysvětleno.

cards.en: The applications we are not interested in get/are thrown away.
cards.cz: Žádosti, o které nemáme zájem, se vyhazují.

cards.en: But we warned them not to go to the mountains in such terrible weather.
cards.cz: Ale my jsme je varovali, aby nechodili do hor v takovém strašném počasí.

cards.en: But we haven't got enough food and drink to invite twenty people!
cards.cz: Ale my nemáme dost jídla a pití na to, abychom pozvali dvacet lidí!

cards.en: But you told me to come too!
cards.cz: Ale ty jsi mi řekl, abych přišel také!

cards.en: When I get home I'm going to write them a long letter so (that) they know I (have) had a wonderful holiday with them.
cards.cz: Až se dostanu domů, napíši jim dlouhý dopis, aby věděli, že jsem s nimi prožil [měl] báječnou dovolenou.

cards.en: He was too drunk to stand up.
cards.cz: Byl moc opilý na to, aby se postavil.

cards.en: She was still too ill to leave the hospital.
cards.cz: Byla ještě příliš nemocná na to, aby odešla z nemocnice.

cards.en: She was too weak to get to a/the telephone.
cards.cz: Byla moc slabá na to, aby se dostala k telefonu.

cards.en: They travel too often to have a pet.
cards.cz: Cestují moc často na to, aby měli domácí zvíře.

cards.en: What do you advise me to do?
cards.cz: Co mi radíš, abych udělal?

cards.en: She practises too little to be a good pianist.
cards.cz: Cvičí moc málo na to, aby byla dobrou pianistkou.

cards.en: The witch gave the princess a magic drink so (that) she would fall in love with the miller.
cards.cz: Čarodějnice dala princezně kouzelný nápoj, aby se (princezna) zamilovala do mlynáře.

cards.en: Would you give us a few more examples so (that) we can practise the new grammar?
cards.cz: Dal byste nám ještě pár příkladů, abychom si mohli procvičit novou gramatiku?

cards.en: He gave her his handkerchief so (that) she could dry her eyes.
cards.cz: Dal jí svůj kapesník, aby si mohla osušit oči.

cards.en: Take care not to lose the money.
cards.cz: Dávej pozor, abys neztratil ty peníze.

cards.en: Give her my number so (that) she can contact me.
cards.cz: Dej jí mé číslo, aby se se mnou mohla spojit.

cards.en: Put the letter in a safe place so (that) you don't lose it.
cards.cz: Dej ten dopis na bezpečné místo, ať ho neztratíš.

cards.en: Put the vase in the cupboard so (that) he doesn't see you have broken it!
cards.cz: Dej tu vázu do skříně, ať nevidí, že jsi ji rozbil!

cards.en: I'm staying at home this evening so (that) I can finish my/the/a letter to Alice.
cards.cz: Dnes večer zůstávám doma, abych mohl dokončit dopis Alici.

cards.en: The doctor advised him not to eat fried food.
cards.cz: Doktor mu poradil, aby nejedl smažená jídla.

cards.en: He was too fast for them to catch.
cards.cz: He was too fast. They couldn't catch him.

cards.en: Her story was too ridiculous to believe.
cards.cz: Her story was too ridiculous. No one could believe it.

cards.en: His offer was too good to refuse.
cards.cz: His offer was too good. I couldn't refuse it.

cards.en: His phone number is too long for me to remember.
cards.cz: His phone number is very long. I can't remember it.

cards.en: The little girl climbed up on(to) her father's shoulders so that she could see the parade.
cards.cz: Holčička si vylezla na tatínkova ramena, aby mohla vidět ten průvod.

cards.en: Do you want me to tell him?
cards.cz: Chceš, abych mu to řekl?

cards.en: I want to persuade him to go with us.
cards.cz: Chci ho přesvědčit, aby šel s námi.

cards.en: I want you to pay for this.
cards.cz: Chci, abyste za toto zaplatil.

cards.en: They want us to believe them.
cards.cz: Chtějí, abychom jim věřili.

cards.en: Would you like me to stay here with you?
cards.cz: Chtěl bys, abych tady s tebou zůstal?

cards.en: They'd like you to be with them for Christmas.
cards.cz: Chtěli by, abyste byli na Vánoce s nimi.

cards.en: We'd like you to help us.
cards.cz: Chtěli bychom, abyste nám pomohli.

cards.en: She studied intensively so (that) she wouldn't fail the exam a second time/for the second time.
cards.cz: Intenzivně studovala, aby u té zkoušky nepropadla podruhé.

cards.en: Is he experienced enough for us to be able to offer him the job?
cards.cz: Is he experienced enough? Can we offer him the job?

cards.en: Is the text too difficult for you to translate?
cards.cz: Is the text very difficult? Can you translate it?

cards.en: Good, cheap restaurants are hard to find.
cards.cz: It is hard to find good, cheap restaurants.

cards.en: His surname is impossible to pronounce.
cards.cz: It is impossible to pronounce his surname.

cards.en: The truth is sometimes hard to accept.
cards.cz: It is sometimes hard to accept the truth.

cards.en: Jobs aren't easy to find these days.
cards.cz: It isn't easy to find jobs these days.

cards.en: This word isn't easy to spell.
cards.cz: It isn't easy to spell this word.

cards.en: She's not easy to make friends with.
cards.cz: It's not easy to make friends with her.

cards.en: It's too unpleasant to talk about.
cards.cz: It's too unpleasant. I can't talk about it.

cards.en: How often must I (do I have to) tell you not to do that?
cards.cz: Jak často ti musím říkat, abys to nedělal?

cards.en: Is he fast enough to be a professional athlete?
cards.cz: Je dost rychlý na to, aby byl profesionálním atletem?

cards.en: She's old enough to be his mother.
cards.cz: Je dost stará na to, aby byla jeho matkou.

cards.en: It's too early to leave. Let's wait a while.
cards.cz: Je moc brzy na to, abychom odešli. Počkejme chvilku.

cards.en: He's too honest to be a politician.
cards.cz: Je moc čestný na to, aby byl politikem.

cards.en: It's too hot to cook. Let's have a cold lunch.
cards.cz: Je moc horko na to, abych vařila. Dejme si studený oběd.

cards.en: It's too cold to go out for a walk.
cards.cz: Je moc chladno na to, abych šel ven na procházku.

cards.en: He's too disorganized to be a company director.
cards.cz: Je moc nepořádný na to, aby byl ředitelem firmy.

cards.en: She's too impatient to be a teacher.
cards.cz: Je moc netrpělivá na to, aby byla učitelka.

cards.en: It's too late to phone them now (too late now to phone them).
cards.cz: Je moc pozdě na to, abych jim teď volal.

cards.en: She's too selfish to offer them her help.
cards.cz: Je moc sobecká na to, aby jim nabídla svou pomoc.

cards.en: He's too busy to speak with us now.
cards.cz: Je moc zaneprázdněný na to, aby s námi teď mluvil.

cards.en: I'm going to England to learn/in order to learn/so as to learn English.
cards.cz: Jedu do Anglie, abych se naučil anglicky.

cards.en: We eat to live. We don't live to eat.
cards.cz: Jíme, abychom žili. Nežijeme, abychom jedli.

cards.en: I'm too short to reach it.
cards.cz: Jsem moc malý na to, abych na to dosáhl.

cards.en: I'm too old to learn to drive.
cards.cz: Jsem moc starý na to, abych se naučil řídit.

cards.en: I'm too tired to go out this evening.
cards.cz: Jsem moc unavený na to, abych šel dnes večer ven.

cards.en: You're old enough to know such things.
cards.cz: Jsi dost starý na to, abys věděl takové věci.

cards.en: You're still too young to go to the pub.
cards.cz: Jsi ještě moc mladý na to, abys chodil do hospody.

cards.en: You're too talented to waste your time in this job.
cards.cz: Jsi moc nadaný na to, abys ztrácel svůj čas v tomto zaměstnání.

cards.en: Are you really stupid enough to believe that?
cards.cz: Jsi opravdu tak pitomý, abys tomu věřil?

cards.en: The ship's captain ordered the men to open fire.
cards.cz: Kapitán lodi poručil mužům, aby zahájili palbu.

cards.en: I drink a glass of red wine every/each evening so (that) I can sleep better.
cards.cz: Každý večer vypiji sklenku červeného vína, abych lépe spal.

cards.en: I bought tickets yesterday so (that) we wouldn't have to queue/to stand in a queue/to stand in the queue this evening.
cards.cz: Koupil jsem lístky včera, abychom dnes večer nemuseli stát ve frontě.

cards.en: I bought a copy of the magazine so (that) I could read our teacher's article. (I have bought... so I can read...)
cards.cz: Koupil jsem si výtisk [kopii] toho časopisu, abych si mohl přečíst článek od našeho učitele.

cards.en: She bought a dishwasher so (that) she wouldn't have to spend so much time in the kitchen.
cards.cz: Koupila si myčku nádobí, aby nemusela trávit tolik času v kuchyni.

cards.en: She bought a computer so (that) she could work from/at home. (She has bought... so she can work...)
cards.cz: Koupila si počítač, aby mohla pracovat doma.

cards.en: They bought him a bicycle so (that) he wouldn't have to walk to school.
cards.cz: Koupili mu kolo, aby nemusel chodit do školy pěšky.

cards.en: The robber ordered us to give him all our money.
cards.cz: Lupič nám poručil, abychom mu dali všechny své peníze.

cards.en: She's got too many friends to be lonely.
cards.cz: Má moc přátel na to, aby byla osamocená.

cards.en: He's got too many interests to be bored.
cards.cz: Má moc zájmů na to, aby se nudil.

cards.en: She's got too many problems of her own (too many of her own problems) to worry about us too.
cards.cz: Má příliš mnoho svých vlastních problémů na to, aby si dělala starosti také s námi.

cards.en: I've got too much work to waste time on that/it.
cards.cz: Mám příliš práce na to, abych tím ztrácel čas.

cards.en: You should take these shoes to the repair shop so (that) you can wear them again.
cards.cz: Měl bys vzít tyto boty do opravny, abys je mohl znovu nosit.

cards.en: You've had too much beer to drive home.
cards.cz: Měl jsi příliš piva na to, abys domů řídil.

cards.en: We should leave/go now so (that) we don't miss the bus/so as not to miss the bus/in order not to miss the bus.
cards.cz: Měli bychom jít teď, abychom nezmeškali autobus.

cards.en: She loves him too much to leave him.
cards.cz: Miluje ho moc na to, aby ho opustila.

cards.en: He spoke very quietly so (that) he wouldn't disturb us.
cards.cz: Mluvil velmi tiše, aby nás nerušil.

cards.en: Speak more slowly and clearly so (that) we can understand you.
cards.cz: Mluvte pomaleji a zřetelněji, abychom vám mohli rozumět.

cards.en: Could you translate this letter so (that) I know more or less what it's about?
cards.cz: Mohla byste přeložit tento dopis, abych více méně věděl, o čem to je?

cards.en: I had to run so (that) I wouldn't be late.
cards.cz: Musel jsem běžet, abych nepřišel pozdě.

cards.en: We had to run to catch the last train.
cards.cz: Museli jsme běžet, abychom chytili poslední vlak.

cards.en: We had to whisper so (that) we wouldn't wake the baby.
cards.cz: Museli jsme šeptat, abychom to miminko nevzbudili.

cards.en: He must look keen/enthusiastic so (that) they don't think he doesn't want the job.
cards.cz: Musí vypadat nadšeně, aby si nemysleli, že tu práci nechce.

cards.en: You must ask them not to be late.
cards.cz: Musíš je poprosit, aby nepřišli pozdě.

cards.en: Can I borrow some money from you so (that) I can buy you a birthday present?
cards.cz: Můžu si od tebe půjčit nějaké peníze, abych ti mohl koupit dárek k narozeninám?

cards.en: My bag's too small to put these things in.
cards.cz: My bag's very small. I can't put these things in it.

cards.en: I think we should warn her not to go there alone.
cards.cz: Myslím, že bychom ji měli varovat, aby tam nechodila sama.

cards.en: I think we should invite the manager to say a few words.
cards.cz: Myslím, že bychom měli pozvat manažera, aby řekl pár slov.

cards.en: I think you should phone/call him to apologize.
cards.cz: Myslím, že bys mu měl zavolat, aby ses omluvil.

cards.en: I think we've finally persuaded him to stop/give up smoking.
cards.cz: Myslím, že jsme ho konečně přesvědčili, aby přestal kouřit.

cards.en: Do you think she's experienced enough to get the job?
cards.cz: Myslíš, že je dost zkušená na to, aby dostala tu práci?

cards.en: I drew him a map so (that) he would find us without problems.
cards.cz: Nakreslil jsem mu mapu, aby nás bez problémů našel.

cards.en: I'll write (myself) a note so (that) I don't forget to feed the cat.
cards.cz: Napíši si poznámku, abych nezapomněl nakrmit kočku.

cards.en: I wrote her a note so (that) she wouldn't forget to water the plants while I was away.
cards.cz: Napsal jsem jí vzkaz, aby nezapomněla zalévat kytky, zatímco budu pryč.

cards.en: I followed them to find out where they lived.
cards.cz: Následoval jsem je, abych zjistil, kde bydlí.

cards.en: Our maths teacher encourages us not to use calculators.
cards.cz: Náš učitel matematiky nás vyzývá [použijte encourage], abychom nepoužívali kalkulačky.

cards.en: I found a flat in the centre so (that) I could walk to work. (I have found... so I can walk...)
cards.cz: Našel jsem si byt v centru, abych mohl chodit do práce pěšky.

cards.en: He found a part-time job so (that) he could spend/so as to be able to spend/in order to be able to spend more time with his/the family. (He has found... so he can spend...)
cards.cz: Našel si práci na částečný úvazek, aby mohl trávit více času se svou rodinou.

cards.en: We('ve) painted the walls white to make the room look bigger/larger.
cards.cz: Natřeli jsme stěny na bílo, aby místnost vypadala větší.

cards.en: I didn't run fast enough to catch the train.
cards.cz: Neběžel jsem dost rychle, abych chytil ten vlak.

cards.en: They weren't strong enough to lift the piano.
cards.cz: Nebyli dost silní na to, aby zvedli ten klavír.

cards.en: We left our car parked in/on the street so (that) they could put theirs in our garage. (We have left... so they can put...)
cards.cz: Nechali jsme své auto zaparkované na ulici, aby oni mohli dát své do naší garáže.

cards.en: She doesn't want us to know about it.
cards.cz: Nechce, abychom o tom věděli, [ona]

cards.en: I wouldn't like them to find us here.
cards.cz: Nechtěl bych, aby nás tady našli.

cards.en: I wouldn't like her to think that about me.
cards.cz: Nechtěl bych, aby si tohle o mě myslela.

cards.en: I'm not brave enough to try it.
cards.cz: Nejsem dost statečný na to, abych to zkusil.

cards.en: You're not tall enough to be a policeman.
cards.cz: Nejsi dost vysoký na to, abys byl policistou.

cards.en: We're not rich enough to go abroad every year.
cards.cz: Nejsme dost bohatí na to, abychom jezdili každý rok do zahraničí.

cards.en: She hasn't got enough motivation to study every evening.
cards.cz: Nemá dost motivace na to, aby se každý večer učila.

cards.en: I haven't got enough courage to ask him.
cards.cz: Nemám dost odvahy na to, abych se ho zeptal.

cards.en: I haven't got enough money to buy him a birthday present.
cards.cz: Nemám dost peněz na to, abych mu koupil dárek k narozeninám.

cards.en: She doesn't speak English fluently enough to do this job/work.
cards.cz: Nemluví anglicky dost plynně na to, aby dělala tuto práci.

cards.en: He couldn't persuade them to have a church wedding.
cards.cz: Nemohl je přesvědčit, aby měli svatbu v kostele.

cards.en: She's not slim enough to be a model.
cards.cz: Není dost štíhlá na to, aby byla modelkou.

cards.en: I don't type fast enough to be able to work as a secretary.
cards.cz: Nepíši na stroji dost rychle na to, abych mohla pracovat jako sekretářka.

cards.en: He doesn't sing well enough to be a soloist.
cards.cz: Nezpívá dost dobře na to, aby byl sólistou.

cards.en: I didn't stay long enough to hear his reply/answer.
cards.cz: Nezůstal jsem dost dlouho na to, abych slyšel jeho odpověď.

cards.en: It's never too late (for one) to start learning a new language.
cards.cz: Nikdy není moc pozdě na to, aby se člověk začal učit nový jazyk.

cards.en: The/Our new director encourages us to work much harder.
cards.cz: Nový ředitel nás povzbuzuje, abychom pracovali mnohem pilněji.

cards.en: He left before she arrived/came so (that) he wouldn't have to listen to her complaints again.
cards.cz: Odešel před tím, než přišla, aby zase nemusel poslouchat její stížnosti.

cards.en: He opened the box to see what was inside.
cards.cz: Otevřel tu krabici, aby se podíval, co je vevnitř.

cards.en: She opened the window so (that) the bird could fly out.
cards.cz: Otevřela okno, aby ten pták mohl vylétnout.

cards.en: She opened the window to air the room.
cards.cz: Otevřela okno, aby v místnosti vy větrala.

cards.en: I'm writing you a note so (that) you don't forget to water the plants while I'm away.
cards.cz: Píši ti vzkaz, abys nezapomněl zalévat kytky, zatímco budu pryč.

cards.en: Let's go through the park today so (that) we don't meet him on the way.
cards.cz: Pojďme dnes přes park, ať ho nepotkáme cestou.

cards.en: Let's go out for lunch. I'm too lazy to cook today.
cards.cz: Pojďme ven na oběd. Jsem moc líná na to, abych dnes vařila.

cards.en: I continued with the work so (that) she could have a rest.
cards.cz: Pokračoval jsem s tou prací, aby si mohla odpočinout.

cards.en: She tried to persuade him not to believe it.
cards.cz: Pokusila se ho přesvědčit, aby tomu nevěřil.

cards.en: She helped me with the housework so (that) I would have time for (the) shopping too.
cards.cz: Pomohla mi s domácími pracemi, abych měla čas také na nákup.

cards.en: He asked the waiter to bring the bill.
cards.cz: Poprosil číšníka, aby přinesl účet.

cards.en: I asked you not to invite them.
cards.cz: Poprosil jsem tě, abys je nezval.

cards.en: Did you ask your brother to write to me?
cards.cz: Poprosil jsi svého bratra, aby mi napsal?

cards.en: She asked me to buy her a newspaper.
cards.cz: Poprosila mne, abych jí koupil noviny.

cards.en: I'd advise you to study more/harder.
cards.cz: Poradil bych vám, abyste se učili pilněji.

cards.en: He advised me to invest my money with/at another bank.
cards.cz: Poradil mi, abych své peníze investoval do jiné banky.

cards.en: She advised him to look for a new job.
cards.cz: Poradila mu, aby si hledal novou práci.

cards.en: He built a fence so (that) the dog couldn't escape from the garden. (He has built... so the dog can't...)
cards.cz: Postavil plot, aby pes nemohl ze zahrady utéct.

cards.en: I needed to see you to talk about it.
cards.cz: Potřeboval jsem tě vidět, abychom si o tom popovídali.

cards.en: He needs you to translate this letter for him.
cards.cz: Potřebuje, abys mu přeložil tento dopis.

cards.en: We need you to advise us.
cards.cz: Potřebujeme, abyste nám poradil.

cards.en: Do you need me to do it for you?
cards.cz: Potřebuješ, abych to pro tebe udělal?

cards.en: I need you to explain this grammar to me (once) again.
cards.cz: Potřebuji, abys mi ještě jednou vysvětlil tuto gramatiku.

cards.en: I need you to lend me some money.
cards.cz: Potřebuji, abys mi půjčil nějaké peníze.

cards.en: He invited her to come in and take a seat/and sit down.
cards.cz: Pozval ji, aby šla dál a sedla si.

cards.en: She invited James to the/her party so (that) she could introduce him to her parents. (She has invited... so she can introduce...)
cards.cz: Pozvala Jámese na večírek, aby ho mohla představit rodičům.

cards.en: They invited us to spend a weekend (with them) at their cottage.
cards.cz: Pozvali nás, abychom strávili víkend u nich na chatě.

cards.en: Shall we invite them to have dinner/supper with us tomorrow evening?
cards.cz: Pozveme je, aby s námi zítra večer povečeřeli?

cards.en: I'm just going out to post/send this letter.
cards.cz: Právě jdu ven, abych poslal tento dopis.

cards.en: He begged me not to tell anyone about it.
cards.cz: Prosil mě [naléhavě], abych o tom nikomu neříkal.

cards.en: She begged them to forgive her.
cards.cz: Prosila je [naléhavě], aby jí odpustili.

cards.en: Please put/clear/tidy your things away so (that) I can use the table.
cards.cz: Prosím tě, ukliď si své věci, ať mohu ten stůl použít.

cards.en: Please tell her not to worry about it.
cards.cz: Prosím, řekni jí, ať si s tím nedělá starosti.

cards.en: Study this example carefully so (that) you don't make the same mistake again.
cards.cz: Prostuduj si tento příklad pečlivě, ať neuděláš tu samou chybu znovu.

cards.en: I'm translating these examples to improve my grammar.
cards.cz: Překládám tyto příklady, abych si zlepšil gramatiku.

cards.en: He stopped baking cakes so (that) she wouldn't get fat.
cards.cz: Přestal péci koláče, aby neztloustla.

cards.en: I moved to Prague so (that) I could find a better job. (I have moved... so I can find...)
cards.cz: Přestěhoval jsem se do Prahy, abych si mohl najít lepší práci.

cards.en: We('ve) moved (in)to a smaller flat to save money.
cards.cz: Přestěhovali jsme se do menšího bytu, abychom ušetřili peníze.

cards.en: Did you persuade them to lend you the money?
cards.cz: Přesvědčil jsi je, aby ti půjčili ty peníze?

cards.en: We arrived/came/were too late to see him.
cards.cz: Přijeli jsme moc pozdě na to, abychom ho viděli.

cards.en: I forced him to give/I made him give me the key.
cards.cz: Přinutil jsem ho, aby mi dal ten klíč.

cards.en: Remind me to phone her tomorrow morning.
cards.cz: Připomeň mi, abych jí zítra ráno zavolal.

cards.en: I reminded him not to tell anyone my secret.
cards.cz: Připomněl jsem mu, aby nikomu neříkal mé tajemství.

cards.en: She came/arrived early to ask the teacher some questions before the lesson.
cards.cz: Přišla brzy, aby se před hodinou zeptala učitele na nějaké otázky.

cards.en: He lent me his lecture notes so (that) I could copy them. (He has lent... so I can copy...)
cards.cz: Půjčil mi své zápisky z přednášky, abych si je mohl opsat.

cards.en: I'll borrow my father's car so (that) I can take you to the airport.
cards.cz: Půjčím si tatínkovo auto, abych tě mohl vzít na letiště.

cards.en: T told him not to work so hard.
cards.cz: Řekl jsem mu, aby tak tvrdě nepracoval.

cards.en: I'm telling you now so (that) you can think about it for a few days.
cards.cz: Říkám ti to teď, abys o tom pár dní mohl přemýšlet.

cards.en: I'm telling you now so (that) you know first.
cards.cz: Říkám ti to ted', abys to nejdřív věděl ty.

cards.en: With three children, she hasn't got enough time or energy to go to work.
cards.cz: Se třemi dětmi nemá dost času ani energie na to, aby chodila do práce.

cards.en: She is too young for her parents to allow her to go out alone.
cards.cz: She is very young. Her parents won't allow her to go out alone.

cards.en: Hide the present somewhere so (that) he doesn't find it.
cards.cz: Schovej někde ten dárek, ať ho nenajde, [on]

cards.en: I ate the cake just so (that) I wouldn't have to look at it.
cards.cz: Snědl jsem ten koláč jen proto, abych se na něj nemusel dívat.

cards.en: Eat something now so (that) you're not hungry later.
cards.cz: Sněz něco teď, ať nemáš později hlad.

cards.en: He repaired the old radio so (that) he wouldn't have to buy a new one.
cards.cz: Spravil to staré rádio, aby nemusel kupovat nové.

cards.en: He's moving nearer his parents so (that) he can see them more often.
cards.cz: Stěhuje se blíže k rodičům, aby je mohl častěji vídat.

cards.en: He studies too little to become a doctor.
cards.cz: Studuje moc málo na to, aby se stal lékařem.

cards.en: I went to the bank to open a new account.
cards.cz: Šel jsem do banky, abych si otevřel nový účet.

cards.en: They were whispering so (that) we couldn't hear anything.
cards.cz: Šeptali, abychom nic neslyšeli.

cards.en: I'm saving to buy a new car.
cards.cz: Šetřím, abych si koupil nové auto.

cards.en: The school needs money to buy another computer.
cards.cz: Škola potřebuje peníze, aby koupila další počítač.

cards.en: The man told us to follow him.
cards.cz: Ten muž nám řekl, abychom ho následovali.

cards.en: The orchestra was invited to give a concert at the Prague Spring festival.
cards.cz: Ten orchestr byl pozván, aby vystoupil [dal koncert] na festivalu Pražské jaro.

cards.en: Dress up warmly so (that) you don't catch/get a cold.
cards.cz: Teple se obleč, ať nenastydneš.

cards.en: That book's too expensive for most students to buy.
cards.cz: That book's very expensive. Most students won't buy it.

cards.en: That skirt's too short to wear for a job interview.
cards.cz: That skirt's too short. You can't wear it for a job interview.

cards.en: The article isn't technical enough to publish in our magazine.
cards.cz: The article isn't very technical. We couldn't publish it in our magazine.

cards.en: The conversation was too quick for us to follow.
cards.cz: The conversation was very quick. We couldn't follow it.

cards.en: The cupboard was too heavy to lift.
cards.cz: The cupboard was too heavy. We couldn't lift it.

cards.en: The exam questions were too difficult to answer.
cards.cz: The exam questions were too difficult. No one could answer them.

cards.en: The fence was too high to look over.
cards.cz: The fence was very high. We couldn't look over it.

cards.en: The grass was too wet for us to sit on.
cards.cz: The grass was too wet. We couldn't sit on it.

cards.en: The hill was too steep to climb.
cards.cz: The hill was too steep. We couldn't climb it.

cards.en: The chair is too unstable to sit on.
cards.cz: The chair is very unstable. You mustn't sit on it.

cards.en: The portion was too large for me to finish.
cards.cz: The portion was very large. I couldn't finish it.

cards.en: The reasons are too complex to explain.
cards.cz: The reasons are too complex. I can't explain them.

cards.en: The road was too busy to cross.
cards.cz: The road was too busy. I couldn't cross it.

cards.en: The rules are too complicated for me to remember.
cards.cz: The rules are very complicated. I can't remember them.

cards.en: The sea was too cold to swim in.
cards.cz: The sea was very cold. We couldn't swim in it.

cards.en: The sun is too bright to look at.
cards.cz: The sun is very bright. You can't look at it.

cards.en: The text was too long to read in one lesson.
cards.cz: The text was too long. We couldn't read it in one lesson.

cards.en: The windows weren't clean enough to see through.
